title: The Special Police Establishment (Repeal) Act, 1974
description: An Act to repeal the Special Police Establishment Ordinance, 1948. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Special Police Ordinance, 1948 (VIII of 1948); It is hereby enacted as follows:-

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Act may be called the Special Police Establishment (Repeal) Act, 1974 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 17th day of October, 1973.

provisions.title: 2. Repeal of Ordinance VIII of 1948
provisions.content: 2. The Special Police Establishment Ordinance, 1948 (VIII of 1948), is hereby repealed.

provisions.title: 3. Repeal of Ordinance XX of 1973
provisions.content: 3. The Special Police Establishment (Repeal) Ordinance, 1973 (XX of 1973), is hereby repealed.
